description: The canonical integration surrogate key for the park account.
The original business-recognized identifier of the park property.
The business-recognized name of the park property.
Descriptive text about the park.
City component of the park's physical address.
State or province of the park's physical address.
Postal code of the park's physical address.
Latitude coordinate of the park.
Longitude coordinate of the park.
Total geographic area of the park in acres.
The park's administrative classification.
The numeric identifier of the organizational region to which this park belongs.
The authoritative operational system code from which this park record originates.
The integer park identifier from InfraTrak (DCR-AST-01). Null for parks not yet onboarded (Regions 3 and 4).
The canonical integration surrogate key for the general ledger entry.
The original business-recognized identifier for the GL entry from StateGov Financials.
The fiscal year in which the GL entry was recorded.
The accounting month (1-12) within the fiscal year for this GL entry.
The classification of the GL entry (Expenditure or Revenue).
The monetary value of the GL entry in USD.
The compound account identifier in fund-DIV-division-PRG-program-OBJ-object format.
The fund component of the compound account identifier.
The division component of the compound account identifier.
The program component of the compound account identifier.
The object code classifying the type of expenditure or revenue.
Human-readable description of the fund from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the division from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the program from the StateGov chart of accounts.
Human-readable description of the object code from the StateGov chart of accounts.
The StateGov mainframe batch identifier for audit traceability.
Raw pipe-delimited invoice memo from the StateGov batch export. Preserved as-is; unpacking is a mart-layer responsibility.
Derived count of invoice records embedded in the batch_detail_text memo field.
The GrantTrack award identifier. Null for GL entries not funded by a federal grant.
The official federal award number from GrantTrack. Null for non-grant entries.
The total ceiling amount of the federal award. Null for non-grant entries.
The minimum non-federal match percentage required for the award. Null for non-grant entries.
The start date of the award performance period. Null for non-grant entries.
The end date of the award performance period. Null for non-grant entries.
GrantTrack budgeted amount for this award in the GL entry fiscal year. Null for non-grant entries.
GrantTrack recorded actual spending for this award in the GL entry fiscal year. Null for non-grant entries.
The authoritative operational system code for this record (DCR-FIN-01).
The canonical integration surrogate key for the physical asset record. Unique within each source system; not globally unique across InfraTrak and GeoParks.
The native identifier from the originating source system. AST-{park}-{seq} format for InfraTrak; INF-{uuid} format for GeoParks.
Foreign key to int_parks. Identifies the park unit that owns or contains this asset.

Primary classification of the asset type. InfraTrak values include Trail Road Bridge Dam Campsite Cabin Restroom. GeoParks values include Trail Road Building Bridge Campsite Boat Ramp Parking Area Utility Corridor.
Secondary classification refining feature_class. Populated for GeoParks records (e.g. Gravel for trails Telecom for corridors). Null for InfraTrak records.
Free-text description of the asset from InfraTrak. Null for GeoParks records.
Year the asset was originally constructed or installed.
Estimated full replacement cost in USD from InfraTrak. Null for GeoParks records.
Design lifespan in years from InfraTrak. Used for depreciation and capital renewal forecasting. Null for GeoParks records.
WGS84 decimal latitude of the asset point location from InfraTrak. Null for GeoParks records which carry geometry_wkt.
WGS84 decimal longitude of the asset point location from InfraTrak. Null for GeoParks records which carry geometry_wkt.
Spatial geometry in Well-Known Text format from GeoParks. Supports LINESTRING and POLYGON for linear and area features. Null for InfraTrak records which carry point coordinates.
Estimated horizontal positional accuracy in meters from GeoParks. Utility corridors carry a documented 5+ meter error. Null for InfraTrak records.
Date the GIS team last reviewed or updated this feature in GeoParks. Null for InfraTrak records.
Operational lifecycle status from GeoParks — Active or Inactive/Abandoned. Null for InfraTrak records.
EAM survey scope flag from InfraTrak. True if this asset is included in condition assessment cycles. Null for GeoParks records.
Source system code identifying the originating system. DCR-AST-01 for InfraTrak Lifecycle; DCR-GEO-01 for GeoParks Enterprise.
Canonical integration surrogate key. Includes observation type prefix for cross-type uniqueness within this model.
Native identifier from the originating BioSurvey table. FFS-seq format for flora/fauna surveys; test_id for water quality; observation_id for invasive species.
Foreign key to stg_biosurvey__survey_sites. Identifies the named ecological monitoring station.
Foreign key to int_parks. Resolved from survey_sites.park_id via infratrak_park_id.
Discriminator identifying the ecological observation sub-type. Values: flora_fauna water_quality invasive_species.
Date the field observation or sampling event was conducted.
Species identifier from BioSurvey species codes. Populated for flora_fauna and invasive_species. Null for water_quality.
Name of the field biologist. Populated for flora_fauna records. Null for other types.
WGS84 decimal latitude of the observation point. Populated for flora_fauna and invasive_species. Null for water_quality.
WGS84 decimal longitude of the observation point. Populated for flora_fauna and invasive_species. Null for water_quality.
Estimated count of observed individuals. Populated for flora_fauna. Null for other types.
Estimated density in individuals per hectare. Populated for flora_fauna. Null for other types.
Measured spatial extent of invasive species infestation in square meters. Populated for invasive_species. Null for other types.
Treatment method applied to invasive species occurrence. Populated for invasive_species. Null for other types.
Date the treatment was applied. Populated for treated invasive_species records. Null for other types.
Dissolved oxygen in mg/L. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
Water pH on 0-14 scale. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
E. coli colony-forming units per 100 mL. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
Water turbidity in NTU. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
Water temperature in Celsius. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
Total nitrogen in mg/L. Populated for water_quality under 2005+ protocols. May be null for pre-2005 records.
Total phosphorus in mg/L. Populated for water_quality under 2005+ protocols. May be null for pre-2005 records.
Water quality testing protocol version. Values: pre-2005 2005-2018 2018+. Populated for water_quality. Null for other types.
Canonical integration surrogate key for the daily visitor count estimate. Generated from metric_id.
Native identifier from TrafficCount derived_visitor_metrics. Format: DVM-{sensor_id}-{YYYYMMDD}.
Foreign key to stg_trafficcount__sensor_locations. Identifies the IoT sensor.
Foreign key to int_parks. Resolved from sensor_locations.park_id (varchar integer) via infratrak_park_id.
Calendar date for which this daily visitor estimate was calculated.
Estimated total person-visits for this sensor on this date. Vehicle counts multiplied by vehicle_multiplier_used plus pedestrian and cyclist counts.
Vehicle occupancy multiplier applied in this estimate. Standard value is 2.7 from a 2019 study; not revalidated since. Preserved for sensitivity analysis.
Timestamp when the TrafficCount vendor system calculated this estimate.
IoT sensor technology classification. Values: Vehicle Magnetometer Pedestrian/Cyclist Infrared.
Human-readable description of sensor installation location (e.g. Main Entrance Gate North Trailhead).
